name: akzo-autonomous-scm
description: L4 autonomous closed-loop for AkzoNobel SCM. Hourly, serverless. Detects lanes with OTIF < 90% in akzo_scm.otif, an LLM (databricks-claude-opus-4-8) proposes a governed scm_reorder/scm_reroute intervention, the Action Plane evaluates it against akzo.action_policies, auto-approves + executes in-policy actions (PO raised on the mock ERP via the akzo_external_systems UC HTTP connection), and escalates over-cap actions to a human gate WITHOUT executing. Every action is audited in akzo.action_events. External targets are mocked for the workshop. Notebook: L200-capabilities/03_autonomous_loop.py.

tasks.description: Run the detect -> decide -> guardrail-gate -> execute|escalate -> verify loop once.
